info.description: API for users to interact with Recontext.online platform - upload recordings, view transcripts, search content
info.title: Recontext.online User Portal API

post.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT token
Request a password reset code to be sent via email
Reset user password using verified code
Verify that the provided reset code is valid
Register a new user account (admin only)

get.description: Get comprehensive dashboard statistics including users, workers, storage, and recordings
Get list of departments for bulk participant selection

post.description: Create a new department in the organizational hierarchy

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific department including statistics

put.description: Update department information (admin only). Automatically recalculates paths for all child departments.

delete.description: Soft delete a department (marks as inactive). Cannot delete department with active users.

get.description: Get all direct child departments of a given department
Get a paginated list of user's uploaded files
Check if the current user has permission to upload files

post.description: Upload an audio or video file for transcription (requires file upload permission)

get.description: Get a list of all user groups

post.description: Create a new user group with permissions (admin only)
Add a user to a specific group (admin only)
Check if a user has permission to perform an action on a resource
Remove a user from a specific group (admin only)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific group

put.description: Update group information and permissions (admin only)

get.description: Get all participants for a specific room
Get a list of LiveKit rooms with optional status filter
Get detailed information about a specific room
Get all tracks for a specific room
Get a list of webhook events with optional filters

post.description: Services send log entries to the managing portal

get.description: Get a paginated list of active meeting subjects

post.description: Create a new meeting subject/topic category (admin only)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific meeting subject

delete.description: Soft delete a meeting subject (admin only)

get.description: Get a paginated list of meetings where user is participant or speaker

post.description: Create a new meeting (requires can_schedule_meetings permission or admin/operator role)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific meeting (must be participant/speaker or admin)

put.description: Update meeting information (must be creator or admin)

delete.description: Delete a meeting (must be creator or admin)

get.description: Get LiveKit access token for joining a meeting room (can join 10 minutes before start)
get.summary: Get LiveKit token for joining a meeting

get.description: Query metrics with optional filters

post.description: Services send telemetry metrics to the managing portal

get.description: Get aggregated system-wide metrics
Check if the current user has permission to use RAG search

post.description: Perform semantic search using RAG over transcriptions

get.description: Get statistics about the RAG system
Get a paginated list of user's recordings

post.description: Upload an audio or video file for transcription

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific recording
Search through transcripts using semantic or keyword search
Get list of all registered services

post.description: Update service heartbeat to indicate it's still alive
Register a new service with the managing portal

get.description: Get overall system status and service health
Get list of users for participant selection in meetings

put.description: Change password for the authenticated user

get.description: Get user profile information

delete.description: Delete a user from the system (admin only)

post.description: Upload a user avatar image

get.description: Check if the service is healthy
Get current status and statistics of the transcription worker

post.description: Receives webhook events from LiveKit server (room_started, participant_joined, track_published, track_unpublished, participant_left, room_finished)

department_ids.description: Departments this subject is linked to

created_by.description: User ID who created the meeting

livekit_room_id.description: Link to LiveKit room if started

reason.example: User has write access to recordings

message.example: Password reset code sent to your email

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
